name: chrX_Xq22_1_PLP1_PMD_SD
description: Xq22.1-22.2 region containing PLP1 (proteolipid protein 1). PLP1 is duplicated in ~70% of Pelizaeus-Merzbacher disease (PMD) cases via non-recurrent CNVs whose breakpoints often fall in flanking LCR-like elements (~5-25 kb at 90-99% identity) on either side of PLP1. Triplication and complex rearrangements also documented.

architecture.internal_structure: Several short SD blocks (5-25 kb) flanking PLP1 in inverted/direct orientation; complex non-recurrent rearrangements typical.
